title: Junior Instructional Designer at Anna University South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Anna University South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Anna University South Asia Partners:
Anna University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University South Asia Partners!
